protocol: strict MOMENT PCA32 tiny Mamba2 distributional path critic; fit-only 2020-2022; 2023 Top-10 frozen before 2024+ features/metrics; next-bar entry; hold576; 6bp/side; full-window CAGR; strict intratrade MDD

input.causal_context_rule: for each completed-hour anchor end, use values[:, end-context:end] only
